description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a folder named 'Invoices 2024' in the Documents area, then find PDF files in Documents whose names start with 'Invoice_2024', move exactly 5 of them into that folder, and star the folder.
tasks.name: Create a folder named 'Invoices 2024' in the Documents area, then find PDF files in Documents whose names start with 'Invoice_2024', move exactly 5 of them into that folder, and star the folder.
tasks.description: Create a folder named 'Invoices 2024' in the Documents area, then find PDF files in Documents whose names start with 'Invoice_2024', move exactly 5 of them into that folder, and star the folder.

tasks.instruction: For the project folder under Projects that already has both a viewer and an editor collaborator assigned, share it with a viewer account named 'alex_viewer' and an editor account named 'jamie_editor', restrict its link so that only invited people can access it, and set that link to expire by the end of 2025.
tasks.name: For the project folder under Projects that already has both a viewer and an editor collaborator assigned, share it with a viewer account named 'alex_viewer' and an editor account named 'jamie_editor', restrict its link so that only invited people can access it, and set that link to expire by the end of 2025.
tasks.description: For the project folder under Projects that already has both a viewer and an editor collaborator assigned, share it with a viewer account named 'alex_viewer' and an editor account named 'jamie_editor', restrict its link so that only invited people can access it, and set that link to expire by the end of 2025.

tasks.instruction: Among all video files, identify the three largest that are at least 500 MB in size, move the two largest into an 'Archive' subfolder inside the Videos section (creating it if needed), and permanently delete the third-largest.
tasks.name: Among all video files, identify the three largest that are at least 500 MB in size, move the two largest into an 'Archive' subfolder inside the Videos section (creating it if needed), and permanently delete the third-largest.
tasks.description: Among all video files, identify the three largest that are at least 500 MB in size, move the two largest into an 'Archive' subfolder inside the Videos section (creating it if needed), and permanently delete the third-largest.

tasks.instruction: For the single PDF stored at the top level of My Files, create a public link that lets anyone with the link view but not download the file, set the link to expire by the end of June 2025, and copy the link.
tasks.name: For the single PDF stored at the top level of My Files, create a public link that lets anyone with the link view but not download the file, set the link to expire by the end of June 2025, and copy the link.
tasks.description: For the single PDF stored at the top level of My Files, create a public link that lets anyone with the link view but not download the file, set the link to expire by the end of June 2025, and copy the link.

tasks.instruction: Create a 'Q3 Reports' subfolder under Reports, then find spreadsheet files whose names include 'Q3' and that were modified within the last 60 days, sort them by most recently modified, and move the three newest into that subfolder.
tasks.name: Create a 'Q3 Reports' subfolder under Reports, then find spreadsheet files whose names include 'Q3' and that were modified within the last 60 days, sort them by most recently modified, and move the three newest into that subfolder.
tasks.description: Create a 'Q3 Reports' subfolder under Reports, then find spreadsheet files whose names include 'Q3' and that were modified within the last 60 days, sort them by most recently modified, and move the three newest into that subfolder.

tasks.instruction: For the only top-level document that has version history enabled, open its version history and restore the newer of the versions created in January 2024, then close the document.
tasks.name: For the only top-level document that has version history enabled, open its version history and restore the newer of the versions created in January 2024, then close the document.
tasks.description: For the only top-level document that has version history enabled, open its version history and restore the newer of the versions created in January 2024, then close the document.

tasks.instruction: In the Recent items view, filter to PDFs and make the two most recently opened PDFs available offline, then in the Projects area make the project subfolder that was most recently modified available offline as well.
tasks.name: In the Recent items view, filter to PDFs and make the two most recently opened PDFs available offline, then in the Projects area make the project subfolder that was most recently modified available offline as well.
tasks.description: In the Recent items view, filter to PDFs and make the two most recently opened PDFs available offline, then in the Projects area make the project subfolder that was most recently modified available offline as well.

tasks.instruction: In the 'Shared with me' section, sort items by newest first, open the sharing settings for the most recently shared individual file (not a folder), turn off downloading for its viewer-level collaborator, and add a 'Confidential' label to that file.
tasks.name: In the 'Shared with me' section, sort items by newest first, open the sharing settings for the most recently shared individual file (not a folder), turn off downloading for its viewer-level collaborator, and add a 'Confidential' label to that file.
